## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots (synthetic data only).

## Environment

## Additional context

Anything else that helps — logs, related issues, suspected cause.

> Do **not** include real curriculum, learner, or organizational data. For security vulnerabilities, follow [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead of opening a public issue.
